articles.title: Superhuman acquires AI detection startup GPTZero
articles.description: Superhuman, which also has an AI detection tool as part of Grammarly, has snapped up GPTZero.

articles.title: After betting the firm on Anthropic, Menlo Ventures raises victorious $3B fund
articles.description: Menlo has created a solid rep for itself as an AI investor, all based on one gutsy $750 million move in 2024.

articles.title: Mark Zuckerberg wants Meta to launch its own prediction market
articles.description: The app would be independent of Meta's other social media offerings, although sources told the NYT that those social sites could direct users to engagement with the app.

articles.title: Anthropic’s Claude Tag is learning your company, one Slack message at a time
articles.description: Anthropic’s new Claude Tag brings an always-on AI teammate to Slack. But beyond productivity, the feature is a strategic play to capture organizational context, institutional knowledge, and enterprise workflows.

articles.title: Password manager maker LastPass says hackers stole customer support case data during Klue breach
articles.description: This is the second data breach to affect LastPass customers in recent years, after one of the password manager's tech partners was recently breached.

articles.title: HaloBraid raises $7M from Seven Seven Six to end the six-hour hair salon appointment
articles.description: HaloBraid aims to help salons speed up braiding with its first device, slated to launch later this year, that acts as a braiding assistant for professional stylists.

articles.title: Meta debuts new, cheaper smart glasses under its own brand
articles.description: The smart glasses are available in several countries starting today in a variety of color and lens combinations.

articles.title: 4 days left to save up to $190 on TechCrunch Founder Summit 2026
articles.description: Four days left to save up to $190 on your pass to TechCrunch Founder Summit 2026 — the ultimate founder bootcamp — before Early Bird rates end on June 26 at 11:59 p.m. PT. Register today.

articles.title: Ribbie turns real-time baseball stats into arcade-like, pixel-art broadcasts
articles.description: Ribbie lets you follow along live with MLB games with a delightful, arcade-inspired interface.

articles.title: Fika Jobs raises $4M to build a video-first hiring platform where AI agents interview candidates
articles.description: Stockholm-based startup Fika Jobs is building a video-first hiring platform that combines AI interview agents with short-form video profiles, creating something that feels like a cross between LinkedIn and TikTok.

articles.title: The running list: major tech layoffs in 2026 where employers cited AI
articles.description: A running look — in reverse chronological order — at the bigger tech companies that have announced significant layoffs this year with AI as a stated factor.

articles.title: OpenAI launches new initiative to help find and patch open source bugs
articles.description: OpenAI is using AI to help the open source community better protect itself.

articles.title: Tesla pushes back on Autopilot narrative after fatal Texas crash
articles.description: Whether the Autopilot system was truly active, overridden, or malfunctioning likely won't be resolved until investigators finish combing through the vehicle's data logs.

articles.title: Shareholders sue Uber’s board over sexual assaults, other incidents
articles.description: The lawsuit, led by a Detroit pension fund, alleges Uber's board and management has cut too many compliance corners, resulting in thousands of lawsuits.

articles.title: The AI world is getting ‘loopy’
articles.description: The loop takes agentic AI a step further by authorizing a swarm of agents to work continuously in the background, endlessly.

articles.title: Microsoft and Chevron plan one of the largest gas-powered data center projects in US
articles.description: Microsoft inked a 20-year power purchase agreement with Chevron, locking in decades of carbon emissions from a new natural gas power plant.

articles.title: AI chipmaker Groq confirms $650M raise, re-staffs after Nvidia’s $20B not-acqui-hire deal
articles.description: What does an AI company do after one of those not-acqui-hire deals? Groq raised money, is leaning into its neocloud business, and is hiring new execs.

articles.title: Nvidia wants to cut data center water use, but that’s not the same as fixing AI’s water problem
articles.description: Nvidia announced a new cooling system that cuts water use inside the data center. But it does nothing to address AI's biggest water use — fossil fuel power plants.

articles.title: Tata Electronics, a major tech supplier to Apple and Tesla, confirms data breach
articles.description: The incident comes as Tata Electronics expands its role in global technology supply chains.

articles.title: US's climate.gov site, taken down by Trump, relaunched by nonprofit
articles.description: Climate.us has now restored everything taken down by the government.

articles.title: Odd police video shows drone removing knife from motionless suspect
articles.description: Promo video comes as more US police departments fly drones as first responders.

articles.title: Oracle’s 21,000 layoffs help drive its debt-fueled AI investments
articles.description: Oracle is spending billions on data center infrastructure to support AI.

articles.title: A curious crossover: The Toyota C-HR review
articles.description: Although it's on the smaller side, this electric vehicle is not very chill.

articles.title: ABC asks viewers to protest FCC attempt to "control who is allowed" on The View
articles.description: "The FCC wants to control who is allowed on the show," ABC ad tells viewers.

articles.title: Early land animals skipped the tadpole phase
articles.description: Current amphibian development may not have been typical of early land vertebrates.

articles.title: Trump may be mystery patient in odd case of 79yo getting experimental obesity drug
articles.description: White House spokesperson denied it was Trump only after story was published.

articles.title: Everyone pays the price as patent holders on seeds stifle innovation
articles.description: The US is one of a handful of countries that allow patents on plant varieties.

articles.title: Sony releases trailer for Taika Waititi's Klara and the Sun
articles.description: Tonally, the trailer gives strong vibes akin to the director's 2016 feature Hunt for the Wilderpeople .

articles.title: How to burst the AI bubble: Strike at its roots
articles.description: Sci-fi author/tech journalist Cory Doctorow on his new book, The Reverse Centaur's Guide to Life After AI .

articles.title: With Starfall, SpaceX eyes an edge in global cargo delivery from orbit
articles.description: The purpose of Starfall is to support the "transport and delivery of goods through space."

articles.title: GM installs robots at flagship EV factory after laying off 1,300 workers
articles.description: US autoworkers union warns of robot automation as dark factory future looms.

articles.title: Report: Kennedy Space Center not ready for era of super heavy rockets
articles.description: SpaceX has told NASA it plans to launch Starship every eight days from Kennedy.

articles.title: Man used massage gun on his tired eyeballs. It went as well as you'd expect.
articles.description: He had retinal tears and bruises from squishing his eyeballs with the gun.

articles.title: Polymarket's viral videos showed people winning big, but the bets were fake
articles.description: "Winning" bets were made on cloned website and would have lost money, WSJ finds.

articles.title: Following user outcry, AMD reinstates memory encryption in consumer CPUs
articles.description: Critics saw the move as an underhanded way to steer them toward more costly chips.

articles.title: Valve's Steam Machine ships June 29 for $1,049, but you probably won't be able to buy one yet
articles.description: Valve says it's using a randomized purchase queue to make the experience "less frustrating and more fair."

articles.title: NHTSA investigating alleged Tesla Autopilot crash that killed woman in her home
articles.description: Tesla touts Autopilot as lifesaving a day after grandmother died in crash.

articles.title: Lucid lays off 1,500 workers in second big cut of the year
articles.description: The cuts and redundancies are part of a plan to "simplify the company," the CEO says.

articles.title: A US military exercise in space got underway with barely anyone noticing
articles.description: The Space Force wants to cut the time to field new satellites from years to weeks, days, or hours.

articles.description: Article URL: https://www.the3dprintingnerd.com/ab2047 Comments URL: https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=48652184 Points: 113 # Comments: 43

tech.summary:
今日科技动态摘要

1. **AI领域并购与融资活跃**：Superhuman收购AI检测初创公司GPTZero；Menlo Ventures在押注Anthropic后成功募集30亿美元基金；Anthropic的Claude Tag功能正通过分析Slack消息来学习企业行为。
2. **Meta加速硬件与功能布局**：Meta推出更便宜的自有品牌智能眼镜；扎克伯格计划推出Meta自己的预测市场；同时，Meta在AI驱动的裁员潮中也被列入相关名单。
3. **安全与法律事件频发**：密码管理公司LastPass在Klue数据泄露事件中遭黑客窃取客服案例数据；特斯拉就德州致命车祸中的Autopilot角色进行反驳；Uber董事会因性侵等事件被股东起诉。
4. **AI赋能新兴行业与工具**：Fika Jobs获400万美元融资，打造AI面试官视频招聘平台；OpenAI启动新计划帮助发现并修复开源软件漏洞；Ribbie将实时棒球数据转化为像素风街机风格直播。
5. **其他值得关注的动态**：HaloBraid获700万美元融资，旨在缩短美发沙龙六小时耗时；TechCrunch创始人峰会2026早鸟优惠仅剩4天；AI行业正变得“疯狂”（loopy）。

**今日最值得关注的发展**：AI领域的资本运作与产品渗透持续加速，同时科技巨头在安全、法律与伦理层面的挑战也愈发突出。

articles.title: Using AI to help physicians diagnose rare genetic diseases affecting children

articles.description: OpenAI and Molecule.one show how a near-autonomous AI chemist using GPT-5.4 improved a key drug-making reaction, advancing medicinal chemistry research.

ai.summary:
今日AI动态摘要

1. **多模态与具身智能进展**：Hugging Face发布多项前沿研究，包括语言引导的3D运动预测模型MolmoMotion、从Hub到机器人硬件的Strands Agents与LeRobot集成，以及面向长周期任务的GLM-5.2模型，推动AI从文本走向物理世界。

2. **模型优化与评估新方法**：探讨超越LoRA的微调技术、开放模型在自定义工具上的代理能力基准测试，以及跨域存储API在Transformers.js中的实验，强调轻量化、可复现的模型部署与评估。

3. **AI应用与安全边界拓展**：展示50语种OCR模型PP-OCRv6、用本地模型免费分类OpenClaw仓库、医疗AI AMIE管理健康条件的新研究，同时揭示代理模型在机密保持方面的漏洞（MosaicLeaks），提醒安全风险。

4. **开源生态与工具链加速**：Hugging Face实现每周迭代发布、CUGA轻量框架提供20余个代理应用实例，OpenAI则推动高级AI共享标准建设，体现社区与商业公司共同加速AI工具链迭代。

5. **重大突破案例**：GPT-5帮助免疫学家Derya Unutmaz解决持续三年的科学谜题，证明前沿模型在科研发现中的实际价值。

**今日最值得关注的发展是：GPT-5在真实科研中解决三年未解之谜，标志着AI从辅助工具向主动发现者的关键跨越；同时，多模态与机器人集成（MolmoMotion、LeRobot）正加速AI从数字世界走向物理世界。**

cctv.summary:
今日新闻联播动态摘要

1. **中国铁路调图与交通发展**：自7月1日起，中国将实施新的列车运行图，其中包括开通北京至乌鲁木齐的高速铁路服务，进一步提升全国铁路运输效率与覆盖范围。

2. **中方专家批驳菲律宾外长涉日菲海域划界言论**：中国专家批评菲律宾外长关于日菲海域划界“与中国无关”的说法，指出此举背后存在超出双边谈判的不可告人目的，警告相关动向可能损害地区稳定。

3. **中国超级计算机重返世界第一**：中国在最新全球超级计算机排名中超越美国，自2017年以来首次夺回榜首位置，彰显中国在高性能计算领域的持续突破与领先优势。

4. **中国新能源与人工智能产业加速发展**：宁德时代押注换电技术以降低欧洲电动卡车成本；智谱AI在人工智能热潮中市值突破万亿人民币；中国接近推出mBridge系统作为SWIFT的替代方案，推动金融与能源领域自主创新。

5. **国际关注中国对全球油价与AI格局的影响**：多家外媒分析指出，未来油价走势可能取决于中国；同时，中国正迎来新一轮人工智能发展热潮，并在欧洲视角下形成系统性竞争与合作的复杂态势。

**今日最值得关注的发展**：中国在超级计算机领域重夺世界第一，并加速推进高铁、AI、新能源及跨境金融基础设施建设，展现出科技与交通领域多线并进的强劲发展势头。
